wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Tinker Time.png}} {{E|Tinker Time|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in {{2|Glory}}. == Options == This event lets you create a custom {{C|Mad Science||2}} card by choosing a card type and a rider effect. === Step 1: Choose Card Type === * {{Frame|Weapon}} Create an Attack. (Deal 12 damage.) * {{Frame|Protector}} Create a Skill. (Gain 8 {{BD|Block||2}}.) * {{Frame|Gadget}} Create a Power. Two of the three types are offered at random. === Step 2: Choose Rider Effect === Two rider effects are offered at random from the type's pool: '''Attack Riders:''' * '''Sapping''' — Apply 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. Apply 2 {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}. * '''Violence''' — Hits 2 additional times. * '''Choking''' — Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 6 HP. '''Skill Riders:''' * '''Energized''' — Gain 2 energy. * '''Wisdom''' — Draw 3 cards. * '''Chaos''' — Add a random card into your Hand. It's free to play this turn. '''Power Riders:''' * '''Expertise''' — Gain 2 {{BD|Strength||2}}. Gain 2 {{BD|Dexterity||2}}. * '''Curious''' — Powers cost 1 less. * '''Improvement''' — At the end of combat, [[Upgrade]] a random card. == Dialogue ==
Navigating through an {{TS|red|up|endless sea of corpses}}, you find a {{TS|orange||mad scientist}} scavenging for various scraps. "Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next {{TS|green||atrocity device}}! How about it?"
{{Frame|Choose Card Type}}
"What kind of tool will help you {{TS|red|shake|kill everyone}}?"
{{Frame|Choose Rider Effect}}
"Excellent choice! Now what should it DO?" The {{TS|orange||scientist}} rubs her hands together with glee.
{{Frame|Done}}
"Whew! All done. This is for you! Now get out there and {{TS|red|shake|slaughter}}!!" Little did you know, that {{TS|orange||scientist}} went on to create hundreds of weapons, resulting in several thousand deaths within the Spire.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
